result:
The **Snowflake Crystal Growth** mode is already fully implemented in this project. It includes:

- **Full Reiter hexagonal solidification model** with vapor diffusion on a hex grid (lines 14545-14958)
- **12 presets** covering all requested morphologies: Classic Dendrite, Thin Needles, Broad Plates, Fernlike, Stellar Dendrite, Sectored Plate, Simple Hexagon, Hollow Columns, Noisy Crystal, Asymmetric Growth, Fast Dendrite, and Sparse Frost
- **Six-fold symmetry** enforcement using cube coordinate transforms
- **Tunable parameters**: alpha (deposition rate), beta (background vapor), gamma (noise), mu (diffusion rate)
- **Key binding**: `*` to toggle the mode
- **Complete UI**: preset menu, simulation view with crystal edge rendering, parameter controls, info/hint bars
- **Wired into main loop** dispatch (lines 3364-3374) and key handling (lines 3767-3772)

No changes needed — this mode already exists with everything described in the task specification.
